raw:
ORRAPUS - Feedback

- The nifty proxy browser has issues with navigation within the site. If i go backward in the page order at all the whole thing will often break and I have to start from scratch.

- integrate the nifty proxy into orraviewer such that when the user views the /mnt/vault/read folder they can see both the local pathway and the remote pathway. If the user chooses the remote pathway they should be guided through the directory structure in the analagous menu display to the local pathway. If the user chooses the remote pathway they should be guided through the directory structure in the analagous spot.

- nfproxy should no longer be a sub-app of nfreader. nfproxy is a sub-app of orraviewer. It displays the same (with the numerous improvements) and it is fast and reliable. opening the local folders is also an option within orraviewer but I imagine it will be taken less often.

- make certain you haveinstalled the right logo at /home/corr/projects/orrapus/'icon ideas'/final.png

- the 5 oldest cbtrim videos should be pre-cached so the user never has to wait for navitation. This should happen in the background all the time only when there is headroom.
optimized:
### OPT-001: Fix nfproxy back-navigation breakage
Fix nfproxy's in-site navigation so moving backward through page order no longer breaks the session. Currently, any backward navigation frequently corrupts state and forces a full restart. Ensure history traversal is reliable across all supported pages.

Source: Raw bullet 1

### OPT-002: Migrate nfproxy from nfreader to orraviewer
Relocate nfproxy so it is a sub-app of orraviewer instead of nfreader. When the user opens `/mnt/vault/read` in orraviewer, present both a local pathway and a remote (nfproxy) pathway. Selecting the remote pathway must guide the user through the Nifty directory structure using a menu display analogous to the local pathway, in the analogous UI location. The remote pathway must be fast, reliable, and carry over the nfproxy improvements. Local folder browsing remains available but is expected to be the less-used option. UI between local and remote pathways must be visually identical.

Source: Raw bullets 2 and 3

### OPT-003: Install final orrapus logo
Verify and install the logo at `/home/corr/projects/orrapus/icon ideas/final.png` as the active orrapus logo across all locations that reference it.

Source: Raw bullet 4

### OPT-004: Background pre-cache of 5 oldest cbtrim videos
Pre-cache the 5 oldest cbtrim videos in the background so the user never waits during navigation. Pre-caching must run continuously in the background and must only execute when system headroom is available. Never block or degrade foreground activity.

Source: Raw bullet 5

orrapus.title: Migrate nfproxy from nfreader to orraviewer
Background pre-cache of 5 oldest cbtrim videos

dedup_note: All four optimized instructions matched existing entries in orrapus/instructions_inbox.md from a prior intake run. No new INS IDs appended. PM incorporation already complete in orrapus/PLAN.md (Recent Changes 2026-04-07).
